firstUserMessage:
You are a senior full-stack developer. I have a basic static HTML/CSS website called “Guts 2 Brain / IBD Tracker” deployed on GitHub Pages.

Current files:
- index.html
- styles.css

Current form tracks:
date, bloating, pain, stress, fatigue, stool score, day type, flare status, blood/mucus, key foods, notes, email.

Please review the current structure and give me a practical roadmap to turn this into a multi-user IBD tracking web app with:
- user accounts
- secure database storage
- symptom history
- trend charts
- flare-up warning logic
- food/trigger correlation analysis
- exportable reports

Assume I am still learning web development. Explain the recommended stack and next steps clearly.
